---
title: "Contact"
title-block-banner: true
---

**Email:** yourname@arizona.edu  
**Institution:** Steward Observatory, University of Arizona

## Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/)
- [ADS](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)

## Office / collaboration

Feel free to reach out regarding collaborations in star formation, ISM structure, numerical simulations, or synthetic observations.
